summary: Verified 3 new features: (1) LinkedIn-PDF onboarding via POST /api/auth/register-from-pdf, (2) company_logo (Clearbit fallback) + salary regex extraction on /jobs/search across remoteok/ycombinator/hackernews, (3) UI discoverability of LinkedIn PDF upload (Auth page button + dotted drop zone, Browse banner for users without resume, sidebar quick-action button, prominent remote/salary chips on job cards + modal). Backend: 33/33 pytest cases pass (added 6 new — 3 for register-from-pdf valid/duplicate/non-pdf, 3 for logos+salary across sources). Frontend e2e: PDF auth flow registers + parses + redirects to /app/browse in ~12s; non-PDF register path shows Browse banner; demo user banner correctly hidden; sidebar UPLOAD LINKEDIN PDF btn navigates to /app/profile; banner dismiss X removes banner; job modal shows quick-info with REMOTE + $50k-$80k + Location chips and company logo initial. All routes (Browse/Saved/Analytics/Profile) render without error-class DOM elements.

issues: Many ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED console warnings for Clearbit logo URLs (e.g. logo.clearbit.com/). Image elements fail gracefully to initial-letter fallback so UX is unaffected, but it pollutes the console. Consider swap to initial-only OR domain validation before constructing Clearbit URL.

action_items: OPTIONAL: silence broken Clearbit logo 404s by adding onError handler that hides the and shows the initial bubble (currently shown side-by-side or via fallback CSS — works visually but errors flood DevTools).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:275 register-from-pdf — creates user BEFORE Claude call succeeds. If Claude returns garbage JSON, the user account still exists with empty profile. That's acceptable (user can re-import later via /api/profile/import-pdf), but the response doesn't signal partial-failure. Consider including 'profile_parsed: false' in response when parsed is None so the frontend can surface a warning.
server.py:288 password ≥6 chars enforced both via Query(min_length=6) AND a manual check. Redundant — FastAPI will already 422 on min_length violation. Minor.
scrapers.py:77 _extract_salary regex looks for patterns like $120k-$160k. Effective for HN comments but won't match £/€ ranges or 'USD 120,000'. Sufficient for MVP since HN posts are US-centric.

scrapers.py:37 _clearbit_logo silently constructs URLs without checking if the domain resolves. Causes browser-side ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED noise (see frontend_issues). Could be mitigated server-side via async HEAD probe but that adds latency/cost — onError client-side handler is the cleanest fix.
Browse.js — JobCard renders when populated. Recommend onError={(e)=>{e.currentTarget.style.display='none'}} so failed loads hide cleanly.
Auth.js — PDF mode persists email/password between modes (good UX). Submit button label correctly toggles between 'CREATE + PARSE PDF' and 'CREATE ACCOUNT'.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestRegisterFromPDF + TestJobLogosAndSalary — 6 new cases, now 33 total)
test_credentials: demo@careeros.io / demo1234. PDF-mutation tests use throwaway TEST_*@example.com accounts created via /api/auth/register and /api/auth/register-from-pdf. Demo profile NOT mutated.
seed_data_creation: Each backend test run creates ~3 throwaway TEST_*@example.com users (generic register, PDF profile import, register-from-pdf valid + duplicate). Frontend e2e creates 2 more (pdfauth_<ts>@test.com via PDF flow, nopdf_<ts>@test.com via email flow). No cleanup; harmless dummies.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is 33 cases. Sample PDF at /tmp/fake_linkedin.pdf (2.5KB, ~921 chars text). For frontend, the Auth PDF input has data-testid='auth-pdf-input' (display:none) — use page.set_input_files(...) directly on it. Demo user has resume_text so /app/browse banner is hidden for demo; to test banner, register a fresh user via plain email path. Job modal opens via 'Details + AI' button on each card. The Browse page renders 75 cards by default (~25 per source: remoteok+ycombinator+hackernews; wellfound is DataDome-blocked). PDF→Claude register-from-pdf takes ~10-12s end-to-end.
rca of the issue: No issues. All three asks delivered correctly. Only cosmetic note: Clearbit logo URLs for some HN/scraped companies don't resolve, but UI degrades gracefully via initial-letter fallback. Recommend onError handler on tags to silence DevTools noise.
